sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find yellow object position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

yellow = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y'][0]
player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Yellow: boundary={yellow['boundary']}, pixels={yellow['pixels']}")
print(f"Player: boundary={player['boundary']}")

# Get yellow center
rows = [p[0] for p in yellow['boundary']]
cols = [p[1] for p in yellow['boundary']]
yellow_center = ((min(rows)+max(rows))//2, (min(cols)+max(cols))//2)
print(f"Yellow center: {yellow_center}")

# Try clicking on the yellow object
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': yellow_center[0], 'col': yellow_center[1]}])
print(f"\nClick yellow result: {result}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
yellow_remaining = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"Yellow remaining: {len(yellow_remaining)}")

purple = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p']
white = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'W']
print(f"Purple: {purple[0]['pixels'] if purple else 0}, White: {white[0]['pixels'] if white else 0}")

# Check for new blocks
from collections import Counter
color_counts = Counter(n['color'] for n in nodes)
print(f"Colors: {dict(color_counts)}")

# If yellow is gone, check for new target blocks
if not yellow_remaining:
    multi_pixel = [n for n in nodes if n['pixels'] > 10 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'S', 'W', 'p', 'G']]
    print(f"New multi-pixel objects: {len(multi_pixel)}")
    for n in multi_pixel:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
